Fields.Name: Texture Size Scalar
Fields.Description: Scaler with set shadow map resolution

Fields.Name: Texture Size Division
Fields.Description: Divide the set shadow map resolution

Fields.Name: Maximum Resolution
Fields.Description: Clamp the resolution. It will be the resolution judgment for each cascade

Fields.Name: Blur Count Bias
Fields.Description: Blur count bias (set count bias, unchanged at 0)
